alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a transition metal atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic transition metal salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbon-sulfur bond.
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfur compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds derived from sulfinic acid, with the general formula RS(=O)R' ( R not H, R'=any heteroatom).
class.name: Sulfinic acids and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as alkanesulfinic acids. These are organosulfur compounds containing an aliphatic group attached to a sulfinic acid group (or a derivative thereof), with the general formula RSO2R' (R= alkyl, R'=H).

direct_parent.description: Organosulfur compounds containing an aliphatic group attached to a sulfinic acid group (or a derivative thereof), with the general formula RSO2R' (R= alkyl, R'=H).
direct_parent.name: Alkanesulfinic acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organosulfur compounds containing an aliphatic group attached to a sulfinic acid group (or a derivative thereof), with the general formula RSO2R' (R= alkyl, R'=any atom).
subclass.name: Alkanesulfinic acids and derivatives

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
